title: Deep Learning: From Foundations to Frontiers
textbook_refs: Goodfellow, Bengio, Courville: Deep Learning (MIT Press)
Howard & Gugger: Deep Learning for Coders

topics.title: Linear Algebra for Deep Learning: Tensors, Eigenvalues, and SVD
Calculus for Deep Learning: Gradients, Jacobians, and Hessians
Probability and Statistics for Deep Learning: MLE, MAP, and Information Theory
Perceptron to Multi-Layer Perceptron: Universal Approximation Theorem
Activation Functions: Sigmoid, Tanh, ReLU, GELU, Swish, and Mish
Loss Functions: MSE, Cross-Entropy, Hinge, Focal Loss, and Contrastive Loss
Weight Initialization: Xavier, He, and Orthogonal Initialization Strategies
Batch Normalization: Algorithm, Internal Covariate Shift, and Variants (LN, GN, IN)
Dropout and Regularization: L1/L2, Dropout, DropBlock, and Data Augmentation
Optimizers Deep Dive: SGD, Momentum, RMSProp, Adam, AdamW, and LAMB
Learning Rate Scheduling: Warmup, Cosine Annealing, and Cyclical LR
Convolutional Operations: Stride, Padding, Dilation, Depthwise, and Transposed Convolutions
Pooling and Feature Maps: Max Pooling, Global Average Pooling, and Spatial Pyramid
ResNet and DenseNet: Skip Connections, Identity Shortcuts, and Feature Reuse
EfficientNet and MobileNet: Compound Scaling and Lightweight CNNs
Attention Mechanisms: Soft Attention, Hard Attention, and Self-Attention
Positional Encoding: Sinusoidal, Learned, and Rotary Position Embeddings
BERT and GPT Architectures: Encoder-Only, Decoder-Only, and Encoder-Decoder
Variational Autoencoders: ELBO Objective, Reparameterization Trick, and β-VAE
GANs In-Depth: DCGAN, Wasserstein GAN, StyleGAN, and Training Stability
Semantic Segmentation: FCN, U-Net, DeepLab, and Panoptic Segmentation
Pose Estimation: OpenPose, HRNet, and 3D Human Pose Prediction
Speech Recognition: CTC, RNN-T, Conformer, and Wav2Vec 2.0
Sequence-to-Sequence Models: Encoder-Decoder, Attention, and Beam Search
Text Classification: BERT Fine-Tuning, Prompt Engineering, and Few-Shot
Multi-Modal Learning: CLIP, DALL-E, Flamingo, and Cross-Modal Alignment
Knowledge Distillation: Teacher-Student Training and Born-Again Networks
Quantization and Pruning: INT8, Mixed Precision, Magnitude Pruning, and Lottery Ticket
Neural Architecture Search: DARTS, One-Shot NAS, and Evolutionary Methods
Federated Learning: FedAvg, Differential Privacy, and Communication Efficiency
Placement Guide: Deep Learning Interview Questions and Research Directions
